title: Smoked Cold Slovakian Cheese Lasagna
description: A paleo-friendly take on traditional Slovakian cheese lasagna, featuring smoked cold cheese and sweet chilli sauce.

ingredients.name: Smoked Cold Cheese (Slovakian Pirohy Cheese)
ingredients.notes: Available in some Eastern European stores or online

instructions: Boil the Slovakian Flatbread for 3-5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Melt the smoked cold cheese in a pan over medium heat.
Add the basil, garlic, and parsley to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Add the sweet chilli sauce to the pan and stir for another minute.
Combine the egg, almond milk, salt, black pepper, and oregano in a bowl. Mix well.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until combined.
Assemble the lasagna by layering the cooked flatbread, cheese mixture, and a sprinkle of oregano.
Repeat the layers until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake the lasagna in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
